description: Metronome provides usage-based billing and invoicing infrastructure for software companies. It lets teams ingest usage events, define pricing and contracts, and generate invoices and billing-related notifications.
summary: Metronome exposes a bearer-token authenticated REST API at `https://api.metronome.com/v1` and a packaged MCP server runnable via `npx @metronome/mcp` using the same token via environment variable.
